content: هُوَّ إضطَر يِمشي بَدري عَلَشان هُوَّ كاَن عَيَّان
translations: eng:he had to leave early because he was sick

transcriptions.arabizi: huwwa 'idtar yimshi badri Aalashaen huwwa kaen Aayaen
